task_completion.description: Open the Sygic GPS Navigation application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface is visible on the screen.
The main Settings menu of the Sygic app is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Open the 'View & Units' section in Settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'View & Units' settings screen is visible.
The 'GPS Coordinates' option is visible on the screen within the settings.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Degrees, Minutes, Seconds' format is selected and active
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'GPS Coordinates' setting explicitly displays 'Degrees, Minutes, Seconds' as its current active value.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to navigate the app
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard touch or click interactions with the app UI, without evidence of terminal commands being used to force the setting.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Sygic application
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation Android app, not a web browser, text editor, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent didn't just type the expected answer
integrity.visual_evidence: The setting change is shown within the app's native settings UI, rather than being typed into a search bar or notes app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target setting is exactly named 'GPS Coordinates' and is located in the 'View & Units' section of the Sygic app settings. The expected active value to be displayed is 'Degrees, Minutes, Seconds'. An example of this format is 'N 40° 26' 46"'.
